name: orbitkit

metadata.name: orbitkit
metadata.summary: This project is only for Orbit Tech internal use.

documentation:
# orbitkit

[![pypi-version]][pypi]

**This project is only for Orbit Technology [https://www.orbitfin.ai/] internal use.**

Full documentation for the project is available at [https://github.com/clown-0726/orbitkit/tree/main/docs][docs].

---

# Overview

`orbitkit` is a powerful and flexible toolkit for enhancing your application.

Some reasons you might want to use `orbitkit`:

* The out-of-box utils' api to use for your application.
* Customizable all the way down - just use few of code to implement file extraction.

----

# Requirements

* Python (3.5, 3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9)
* Django (2.2, 3.0, 3.1, 3.2)

We **highly recommend** and only officially support the latest patch release of
each Python and Django series.

# Installation

Install using `pip`...
```
pip install orbitkit
```

# Example

Let's take a look at a quick example of using `orbitkit` to build your application.

Startup up a new file extraction like so...
```
pip install orbitkit
```

Now edit any python file in your project:

```python
from pdf_extractor.pdf_block_extractor_v2 import PdfBlockExtractV2

pdf_block_extract = PdfBlockExtractV2(local_path='example.pdf', extend_meta={})
text_block_arr = pdf_block_extract.extract()

for item in text_block_arr:
    print(item)
```

We'd also like to configure `extract_url` as your pleased.

That's it, we're done!

# Documentation & Support

Full documentation for the project is available at [https://github.com/clown-0726/orbitkit/tree/main/docs][docs].

For questions and support, use the [https://github.com/clown-0726/orbitkit/issues] to track.

[pypi-version]: https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/orbitkit.svg
[pypi]: https://pypi.org/project/orbitkit/

documentation:
crawl_init: 爬虫爬取完索引
crawl_downloaded: 爬虫下载附件成功

```
消息链接打开方式，默认False为浏览器打开，设置为True时为PC端侧边栏打开

消息发送失败提醒，默认为False不提醒，开发者可以根据返回的消息发送结果自行判断和处理
```

variables.name: orbitkit.pdf_extractor.pdf_extractor_orbit.logger
documentation:
默认的目录生成规则
文件名称/
- pages.txt
- pages.txt.vector
- blocks.txt
- blocks.txt.vector
- raw-azure-backup.json（如果使用 azure 解析的话，则存储一份原生备份）

文件格式：
- {'id': 'l_9Kk4iDUL', 'page': 125, 'seq_no': 31, 'sentence': 'xxx', 'type': 'sentence', 'text_location': {'location': [[752.7609, 423.47514, 774.3009, 416.99514]]}, 'others': 'xxx'}
- {'id': 'p_9Kk4iDUL', 'page': 1, 'sentence': 'xxx', 'others': 'xxx'}

variables.name: orbitkit.pdf_extractor.pdf_block_extractor_v2.logger
documentation:
方法说明：
\>>> 安装包 \<<\<
pip install pdfplumber # pdfplumber 是基于 pdfminer.six 的，安装这个包的同时也会安装 pdfminer.six
pip install pycryptodome # 有些 pdf 是加密的，可以通过这个包进行有效的解密

```pycon
>>> 思路说明 <<<
通过 pdfplumber 和 pdfminer.six 同时提取文字，如果在一个 page 上如果有表格信息，
则在将 pdfminer.six 提取的 block 信息去表格中找，如果存在表格中，则去掉这条信息。
```

```pycon
>>> 注意事项 <<<
pdfminer.six page 索引是从 1 开始的
pdfplumber page 索引是从 0 开始的
本程序的索引是从 1 开始的
```

methods.name: orbitkit.pdf_extractor.pdf_block_extractor_v2.PdfBlockExtractV2._filter_extend_tables
documentation:
对 table 信息进行扩展
table_info = {
    'x0_list': [],
    'y1_list': [],
    'x1_list': [],
    'y0_list': [],
    'table': [], # 得到去掉 None 信息后的 table
    'values_set': {}, # 得到 table 数据的去重集合（没有 "" 数据）
    'index_set': [], # 如果某条数据在 table 中，则将本条数据的 index 也设置进来，最小的 index 则是当前 table 的 index
    'location': [], # 预留，最后计算 table 的 location 信息
}

functions.name: orbitkit.pdf_extractor_simple.utils.is_no_mess_code
documentation:
常用汉字：一 到 鿿
扩展汉字：㐀 到 䶿
部首补充：⺀ 到 ⻿
符号和标点：　 到 〿
汉字笔画：㇀ 到 ㇯
汉字结构描述字符：⿰ 到 ⿿
中日韩汉字共同使用的汉字：⸀ 到 ⹿:
